scope: Revenue Phase 1.5A governance enforcement and certification closure

branchProtection.bypassPolicy: No routine administrative or repository-role bypass is permitted. Administrators remain subject to the same pull-request and required-check rules; the solo-founder pull-request policy requires zero approvals.

workflowIntegrity.skipBehavior: The generic suite may skip this integration file when REVENUE_TEST_POSTGRES is absent; the required workflow explicitly sets REVENUE_TEST_POSTGRES=true, and its only lifecycle test passed with zero skips.

failingObservation.cause: A temporary negative governance-verification PR intentionally ran exit 1 before the disposable lifecycle. It was closed without merge after the required check failure was observed.

passingObservation.remainingControl: None; the configured solo-founder policy requires zero approvals.

directPushAttempt.observedMessage: GH006: Protected branch update failed; at least 1 approving review was required under the then-current policy.
directPushAttempt.proves: An administrator could not directly update main. The live policy continues to enforce administrators while requiring zero approvals for a pull-request merge.

fullRepositorySuite.note: The four skips are outside the required disposable PostgreSQL workflow; that workflow ran its revenue test with zero skips.

remainingBlocker: Revenue Phase 1.5 production closure remains blocked because the separately authorized production backup/restore rehearsal and one controlled Anchor canary with exact reconciliation have not occurred. Phase 1.6 remains a separate approval and is not authorized by this artifact.
